objective: Implement appearance-envelope extraction over normalized public-reference images: robust per-region statistics (brightness min/max/variance, chroma variance, hue range and dominant axis, specular activation frequency) and metallic/foil/clearcoat/black-ink-suppression/texture-frequency/direction proposals with per-pixel confidence — labeled observed appearance proposals, never physical BRDF measurements.
current_state: Schema frozen by two-lane-p0-state-machine (docs/agent-ops/appearance-envelope.schema.json). material_maps.py exists for the physical lane; this is a separate uncontrolled-reference path and must not claim measurement.
assumptions: Inputs are normalized/registered images plus interference masks conforming to the frozen bundle schemas; tests synthesize them.
Consumes reference_normalize outputs by schema contract only — no import of reference_bundle/reference_normalize modules.
acceptance_criteria: Statistics use robust estimators (median/MAD or equivalent); an injected single overexposed or manipulated source measurably cannot dominate any envelope value (dedicated test).
Sleeve/slab interference regions flagged by normalization metadata are excluded from all statistics.
Specular activation frequency requires evidence from at least two independent sources before a nonzero proposal.
All outputs carry label 'observed-appearance-proposal' and evidence_state limited to source-supported or inferred; the words measured/human-reviewed never appear in generated outputs.
Per-pixel confidence map emitted; outlier sources listed with reasons.
Output validates against the frozen appearance-envelope schema.
required_tests: uv run ruff check src tests
stop_conditions: The frozen schema cannot express a needed field (report; do not edit schemas).
Any requirement would need edits outside allowed_paths.
expected_outputs: Robustness, labeling, exclusion, and schema-validation tests
